channel.title: Cariboo Saturday Morning — Cariboo Mix
channel.description: A curated Saturday morning radio experience drawn from CBC podcasts (World Report, BC Today, Kamloops News, q, Unreserved), with Canadian indie music transitions from Jamendo. Assembled automatically each Saturday for the Cariboo region of BC.
channel.itunes:author: Cariboo Signals
channel.itunes:summary: A curated Saturday morning radio experience drawn from CBC podcasts (World Report, BC Today, Kamloops News, q, Unreserved), with Canadian indie music transitions from Jamendo. Assembled automatically each Saturday for the Cariboo region of BC.

item.title: Cariboo Saturday Morning — April 11, 2026
item.description:
Cariboo Saturday Morning — April 11, 2026

CBC segments featured:

  • U.S.-Iran talks: Who’s got the upper hand? (Front Burner) — Fri, 10 Apr 2026 04:10:00 EDT

Music:

  • Crystals In Our Eyes by Romancoke [indie, alternativerock] via Jamendo (CC)
  • Take it by Manhat10 [rnb, pop, indie] via Jamendo (CC)

Assembled automatically from CBC Radio podcasts for the Cariboo region of BC. Music sourced from Jamendo under Creative Commons licence.

item.title: Cariboo Saturday Morning — April 4, 2026
item.description:
Cariboo Saturday Morning — April 4, 2026

CBC segments featured:

  • Flights, food and finance: is economic chaos coming? (Front Burner) — Fri, 03 Apr 2026 04:10:00 EDT

Music:

  • Handcrafted by Fresh Body Shop [indie, pop] via Jamendo (CC)
  • Leave and Never Look Back by madelyn munsell [pop, indie] via Jamendo (CC)

Assembled automatically from CBC Radio podcasts for the Cariboo region of BC. Music sourced from Jamendo under Creative Commons licence.

item.title: Cariboo Saturday Morning — March 28, 2026
item.description:
Cariboo Saturday Morning — March 28, 2026

CBC segments featured:

  • In Iran, echoes of the Iraq war (Front Burner) — Fri, 27 Mar 2026 04:10:00 EDT

Music:

  • So Called Democracy by Stephane TV [rock, indie, indierock] via Jamendo (CC)
  • Runaways by Elle Lefant [indie, electronic, pop] via Jamendo (CC)

Assembled automatically from CBC Radio podcasts for the Cariboo region of BC. Music sourced from Jamendo under Creative Commons licence.
